scripts.sync-tools: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Path 'bin/OrcaSlicer' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path 'bin/LaserGRBL' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'bin/OrcaSlicer' -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'bin/LaserGRBL' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'C:/gelistirme/OrcaSlicer/build/src/Release/*' -Destination 'bin/OrcaSlicer' -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'C:/gelistirme/LaserGRBL-master/LaserGRBL/bin/Debug/*' -Destination 'bin/LaserGRBL' -Recurse -Force"
